MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Manuel Fuentes.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Christopher Riddle is present.
Attorney Ashley Leslie representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of APR-23-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
